name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Fortress
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug

---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run command '...'
2. Send traffic '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Go version: [e.g. 1.22]
- Fortress mode: [scan/defend]
- XDP mode: [native/generic/offload] (if applicable)

## Logs / Screenshots
If applicable, add logs or screenshots to help explain the issue.

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
